name: Chris Redlitz
summary: Tech entrepreneur and Managing Partner of Transmedia Capital; co-founded the KickLabs accelerator. With Beverly Parenti, launched The Last Mile inside San Quentin in 2010.
imagePlaceholder: Photo placeholder — image use requires permission via the TLM press kit.
alt: Silhouette placeholder for Chris Redlitz, Co-Founder of The Last Mile.

name: Beverly Parenti
summary: Serial entrepreneur focused on advancing innovative technologies. Co-founded The Last Mile in 2010 to bring education and tech training inside San Quentin.
imagePlaceholder: Photo placeholder — image use requires permission via the TLM press kit.
alt: Silhouette placeholder for Beverly Parenti, Co-Founder of The Last Mile.

name: Kevin McCracken
summary: Returned citizen and longtime advocate for second-chance employment. Offered the Executive Director role in 2024 by Chris Redlitz and Beverly Parenti.
imagePlaceholder: Photo placeholder — image use requires permission via the TLM press kit.
alt: Silhouette placeholder for Kevin McCracken, Executive Director of The Last Mile.

name: Molly Kelly
role: Alumna · Vice President, The Last Mile
summary: Completed a 12-month software-engineering program at Indiana Women's Prison through TLM, then took on a leadership role inside the organization. Her path from incarceration to VP is a flagship reentry-success story.
imagePlaceholder: Photo placeholder — alumni photos require explicit consent.
alt: Silhouette placeholder for Molly Kelly, TLM alumna and VP.

name: Billie Edison
summary: TLM alum now employed with the Indiana Pacers. One of many TLM graduates building careers across major employers like the Pacers, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Apple, and Meta.
